tep_universal_constants.recommended_action: Replace with empirically calibrated values from dedicated experiments

parameters.recommended_action: Replace with empirically calibrated values from dedicated experiments

beta.data_source: TEP-EFA pipeline weighted mean from flyby anomaly analysis
beta.derivation: β = 3.4×10⁻⁸ is the fundamental conformal coupling derived from the ensemble weighted mean of flyby anomaly fits (β = 4.64×10⁻⁴) scaled by the characteristic suppression S_⊕ = 0.35; this represents the unscreened cosmological coupling; ±50% uncertainty accounts for systematic uncertainty in GNSS calibration and propagation to cosmological regime
beta.recommended_action: Calibrate with laboratory fifth-force experiments or cosmological constraints

b_over_a_limit.data_source: Covariant holonomy analysis matching GW170817 constraints
b_over_a_limit.derivation: b/a < 1e-15 is the theoretical upper bound on metric directionality derived from covariant holonomy analysis; this matches GW170817 gravitational wave constraints on the speed of gravitational waves; ±100% uncertainty represents the theoretical nature of this bound
b_over_a_limit.recommended_action: Refine with future multi-messenger gravitational wave observations

n_index.data_source: Wide binary R_s transition analysis (Paper 6, UCD)
n_index.derivation: Density threshold index n = 1.0 represents the power-law dependence of scalar force suppression on ambient density; derived from wide binary R_s transitions where orbital period ratios deviate from Newtonian predictions
n_index.recommended_action: Refine with Gaia DR3 wide binary catalog and improved parallax measurements

inferred_rho_floor_g_cm3.data_source: Wide binary R_s transition analysis (Paper 6, UCD)
inferred_rho_floor_g_cm3.derivation: inferred_rho_floor = 2×10⁻²³ g/cm³ is the galactic density floor from wide binary analysis; ±50% uncertainty accounts for scatter in wide binary data and systematic errors in distance measurements
inferred_rho_floor_g_cm3.recommended_action: Refine with Gaia DR3 wide binary catalog and improved distance measurements

export_targets.data_source: TEP-EFA pipeline extrapolation to cosmology and wide binary regimes
export_targets.recommended_action: Calibrate with cosmological observations (CMB, BAO) and wide binary surveys

cosmology.recommended_action: Constrain with CMB power spectrum and BAO measurements

wide_binaries.data_source: Wide binary R_s transition analysis (Paper 6, UCD)
wide_binaries.recommended_action: Refine with Gaia DR3 wide binary catalog and improved distance measurements
